message:
feat(telemetry): add integration tests for telemetry pipeline

Implements 20 integration tests covering the complete telemetry pipeline:
- Collection to Storage flow tests
- SpeedScore storage and retrieval tests
- Multi-worker isolation tests
- Maintenance and aggregation tests
- Protocol serialization roundtrip tests
- Error handling and edge case tests

Closes remote_compilation_helper-09a.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
